# Calculating Percentage Changes

`pctchg` takes a dataframe and a numeric column in it to calculate
percentage changes from one period to the next. If values are missing/0,
the function will return 0 for that observation in the "pctchg\_"
column. Time series dataframes recommended.

## Usage

``` r
pctchg(df, col)
```

## Arguments

- df:

  dataframe containing column of interest

- col:

  name of the column, passed in quotes

## Value

a new dataframe with an additional column containing "pctchg\_"

## Examples

``` r
pctchg(treedat, 'x')
#>     period         x           y z    pctchg_x
#> 1        1  1.048530    5.916203 a          NA
#> 2        2  1.021098    7.444445 b  -2.6162181
#> 3        3  1.187908    2.437572 b  16.3363558
```
